data: You have pronounced leadership qualities: you are proactive, courageous, confident in your decisions and are not inclined to depend on the opinions of others.Power and responsibility come naturally to you, and you know how to manage people without unnecessary stress.Obstacles do not frighten you - on the contrary, you perceive them as a challenge and move forward, relying on your own vision and inner strength.
abilities: You are able to transform circumstances in your favor and achieve significant results.Fate often opens up good opportunities for you, and with inner determination, you can quickly move forward, changing your life for the better.The more actively you move towards something new and do not cling to old patterns, the greater your successes become.
weaknesses: It is important to ensure that confidence does not develop into arrogance.There is a risk of starting to suppress the will of others, imposing your opinion and controlling people too harshly.Strength is truly revealed when respect and inner nobility are added to it.

data: You are someone who is easy and pleasant to be around.You know how to gently adapt to people’s moods and states, and sensitively read their emotions and needs.Harmony, reciprocity and unity in relationships are important to you.You know how to negotiate, find a common language and create an atmosphere of trust.For you, compromise is not weakness, but a smart way to achieve the best for everyone.
abilities: You don't have to aspire to be a leader to be successful.You know how to take the good from other people's ideas and implement them even better than their author.In any task, you show flexibility, creativity and your own unique approach, so the results of your work often turn out to be beyond expectations.You can create a career based on collaboration, support, and smart adaptation.
weaknesses: In difficult circumstances, there is a risk of depending too much on others' opinions or approval.You can, unnoticed by yourself, begin to sacrifice your interests in order to preserve relationships or avoid conflict.It is important to remember your boundaries and not lose yourself in others.

data: You easily find a common language with people and know how to build warm, lively relationships.Your gift for communication, sense of humor and natural charm make you a desirable companion and the life of the party.You know how to create an atmosphere of lightness and joy, quickly win people over and easily expand your circle of acquaintances.You are comfortable being the center of attention - this is your natural environment.
abilities: Life can be truly vibrant and multifaceted if you allow yourself to follow interest and inspiration.You have many abilities, and you can realize yourself in a variety of directions - it is important for you to try.With the right choice of activity, you can fill your life with beautiful events, interesting people, creativity and joy.
weaknesses: Due to the large number of ideas and hobbies, it can be tempting to jump from one to another without bringing what you started to fruition.This can make it difficult to choose a permanent job or a reliable partner.It is important to learn to focus and stop the flow of possibilities from time to time in order to hear what really resonates within.

data: You are a person with a high degree of responsibility and internal integrity.If you take on a task, you will bring it to fruition, because you simply don’t know how to do otherwise.Order, clarity, stability and justice are important to you.You respect traditions, value time-tested methods, and prefer to act reliably and consistently, without leaving anything undone.
abilities: With full dedication to your work, you are able to build a serious career and achieve truly great results.You have a powerful reserve of will within you that allows you to cope with the most difficult tasks.If you firmly decide what needs to be done, nothing can stop you.By developing determination and perseverance, you can achieve goals that seem unattainable to others.
weaknesses: It happens that the desire for order and correctness turns into irritability and excessive demands on others.You may react sharply to someone else's lack of composure or a different attitude towards life.It is important to remember that not all people are required to meet your standards - gentleness and tolerance will help maintain harmony in the relationship.

data: You are a person of movement and constant internal growth.You are attracted to new experiences, knowledge, people, places.It is difficult for you to limit yourself to one direction and framework: interests change, expand, intertwine.You know how to ignite others with your enthusiasm, you quickly get carried away and just as easily inspire others.Wit, quickness of mind and bright words are your strengths in communication.
abilities: Fate gives you many chances to travel, change your environment, learn new things and change areas of activity.Your path is not to stand still.The more you allow yourself to open up to the world, the happier you will become.You have strong abilities in the fields of communication, verbal arts, speaking and creative expression - literature, stage, journalism, media and content - all of which can be your successful implementation.
weaknesses: Due to the diversity of interests, there is a risk of being scattered, giving up what you started and not bringing things to fruition.This can create an image of a fickle or unreliable person.It is important to consciously choose your focus and leave in life only what really resonates with your soul - then your potential will be revealed holistically, and not in fragments.

data: You have a sensitive emotional perception and the ability to love deeply.You are attentive to the conditions of other people, you know how to empathize and support.Warm relationships, a calm atmosphere and a feeling of homeliness are important to you.Family, loved ones and harmony in your personal life take center stage, and you naturally strive to create a space of care and peace around you.
abilities: You quickly remember information and learn easily - so developing and expanding your horizons is important for your inner growth.Over time, you can become a wise, mature person who is turned to for advice and spiritual understanding.The ability to listen, speak softly and warmly open up different paths for you - from pedagogy and psychology to the art of communication and counseling.
weaknesses: In an effort to maintain harmony and relationships, you may begin to adapt too much to others.There is a risk of forgetting about your own desires and values, and losing yourself in the needs of your loved ones.It's important to remember: self-care is not selfish, but the basis for keeping your love alive, sincere and fulfilling.

data: You have a deep inner core and a calmness that is difficult to shake.Your reactions are balanced, your decisions are deliberate - you are not in a hurry and do not succumb to the chaos of circumstances.It is important to understand the essence of what is happening, to understand the underlying reasons, so you tend to observe, analyze and contemplate.Balance and inner confidence are your natural qualities.
abilities: There is a philosopher and a subtle observer living within you.You are attracted to themes of the meaning of life, secret patterns, and the structure of the world.You are able to see beauty in detail, depth in simplicity, and inspiration in silence.This ability can be revealed in art - painting, music, acting, poetry.If you follow your inner interest, your life will become rich and filled with the discovery of truths and meanings.
weaknesses: Restraint and a desire for privacy can create a feeling of closedness.Sometimes it is difficult for the world to understand your depth, and for you to explain it.There is a risk of going too far into thinking, breaking away from real interaction and everyday needs.It is important to periodically return to contact with people, share experiences and feelings - this will provide support and help maintain harmony inside and outside.

data: You have a combination of sound mind, practicality and internal decency.It is easy for you to create a structure, restore order, build stability and a material base.You have the power to not only earn money, but also increase resources.At the same time, you know how to feel people, show compassion and care, which makes you respectful and loved in your environment.Your authority is built not on pressure, but on justice and human relations.
abilities: You can become a strong and wise leader, able to unite people and create successful projects.Material well-being comes to you more easily if you remember about balance: take care not only of yourself, but also of those around you.When you share, support and show nobility, life gives it back to you many times over.The ability to be generous strengthens your charisma and social authority.
weaknesses: The desire to control resources can turn into greed and closedness.If you become too focused on accumulating and stop sharing, supporting, and thanking people, material and human connections can quickly disintegrate.It is important to maintain a generosity of heart - this is what makes your strength sustainable and your well-being lasting.

data: You are a person of depth and inner maturity.They are able to notice what is hidden from the surface and understand the essence of people, events and processes.You have natural wisdom that allows you to perceive life broadly, without narrow frames and prejudices.You easily accept different cultures, worldviews and forms of behavior - in this sense, you are truly a “person of the world.”
abilities: You have strong intuition, which can develop over time into the ability to foresee events and sense their causes.You can be an excellent psychologist, mentor, or the person they come to for advice and inner support.You know how to see the root of a problem and gently help others understand themselves and their relationships.The ability for subtle perception also opens the way to spiritual practices and the development of unusual sensitive states.
weaknesses: Under the influence of difficult life circumstances, there may be a risk of closing your heart and stopping trusting people.If you do not protect your warmth, you can become rigid, distant and indifferent - as a defensive reaction.It is important not to forget about your own source of light and maintain connection with what inspires and warms you from the inside.

data: You have powerful internal energy, confidence and determination.Fears and doubts do not hold you back - you know what you want and are ready to boldly go for it.Perceive obstacles as tasks to be overcome, rather than obstacles.You know how to think independently, act quickly and find innovative solutions.Luck really gravitates towards you - you know how to take advantage of the moment.
abilities: You have strong entrepreneurial and leadership abilities.You can be a leader in any field, especially where courage and initiative are required.Difficult situations only reveal your strength - this is where you show yourself most clearly and confidently.Even if something doesn’t go according to plan, you know how to turn the situation to your advantage and extract benefit or new experience from it.
weaknesses: It is important to remember the measure.Your desire to lead and make decisions can easily turn into pressure and authority, especially in relationships with loved ones.Using force too harshly can destroy intimacy and trust.True power is revealed when it is combined with respect, attention and the ability to hear another.

data: You attract people with your charm, warmth and ability to express your thoughts beautifully.It is important for you to be liked and recognized, so you react subtly to how you are treated and can be deeply worried if someone behaves coldly or unfairly.You have a natural desire to take care of others, support, guide, and be a support for someone.Authority, respect and the opportunity to be significant to others are an important part of your inner world.
abilities: You have a lot of strength and perseverance, although on the outside you may appear soft and sensitive.If you want, you can achieve outstanding results.You know how to create and implement unusual ideas, show creative initiative and move towards goals consistently and focused.Working with inspiration, you are truly capable of becoming the “first” in your chosen business - you have energy, character, and the ability to bring what you start to results.
weaknesses: Your desire to help can easily turn into control or overprotection.In an effort to protect or support loved ones, you risk interfering too much in their lives, depriving them of independence.This can lead to tension and resentment.It is important to maintain a balance: caring should inspire, not suppress, neither you nor those around you.

data: You have a wide range of abilities, and one of the most striking is the ability to communicate.You easily find an approach to people, know how to listen, feel their state and speak so that you are understood.Your charm is natural, you don’t try to please - it happens by itself.At the same time, you are internally stable: even in difficult situations, you maintain clear thinking and are able to act reasonably and calmly.
abilities: Love is an important part of your life.You know how to love deeply and sincerely, and have a natural attractiveness that makes you a desirable partner.Even if a relationship is a painful experience, you know how to “get back up” and return to life with a new understanding.Your heart's ability to heal and open again is your power.With the right approach, you can build very warm, reliable and harmonious relationships.
weaknesses: If the inner support weakens, there may be a tendency to give your love and attention to those who do not value it.There is a risk of wasting your emotional and creative energy on people or situations that provide no warmth or growth in return.It is important to remember your own worth and choose those who are truly worthy of your heart and your talent.

data: You are a thorough, serious and reliable person.Before you act, you think through everything and build a clear plan.You tend to work patiently and persistently, step by step approaching your goal.Your attitude to your work is always deep: if you have chosen a direction, you devote yourself completely to it and work with your soul.It is important for you not just to do it, but to do it correctly and with high quality.
abilities: You usually find early on a calling or an area in which you feel “in the right place.”You have the ability to become a true master: to understand the details, subtleties and nuances in a way that others cannot.Over time, you can become a trusted and respected expert.You are able to build a strong professional reputation, achieve stability and recognition through your dedication and professionalism.
weaknesses: Strong involvement in work can result in distortion.If you ignore rest, personal needs, and emotional cues, you run the risk of serious burnout and exhaustion.Sometimes it is helpful to allow yourself to pause, switch gears and allow your body and nervous system to recover - this is not weakness, but a condition of long-term strength.

data: You have high moral principles and an inner sense of what is right.It is important for you to remain true to yourself and live in accordance with your values.You are smart, intuitive and creative.You know how to find an approach to people, convince them gently and naturally, feeling their state and motives.Thanks to this, you can easily build harmonious relationships.
abilities: You are a bright storyteller and a lively interlocutor.Where the word, contact and inspiration are required, you can achieve great success.Journalism, teaching, writing, lecturing, performing on stage - all this is your element.You are suited to a job where you can share your worldview, impart knowledge, or inspire others.Diversity is important to you: you are able to express yourself in several professions or roles at once.
weaknesses: The desire for novelty and adventure can lead to risky decisions made on impulse.Sometimes this results in mistakes or losses.It is important to maintain a balance between inspiration and common sense - then your opportunities will work for you, not against you.

data: You are a person with a big heart and inner resilience.You genuinely care about others and are always ready to help when needed.You care about justice and are willing to make efforts to maintain order and goodness around you.You are not afraid of difficulties: you know how to accept the situation as it is and calmly do what is required, without unnecessary complaints and drama.
abilities: The main support of your life is your home and loved ones.By creating warmth, comfort and security, you simultaneously fill yourself with meaning.Taking care of your loved ones can become your true source of joy.At the same time, your personality is fueled by knowledge: it is important for you to learn, expand your perception of the world, and grow intellectually and spiritually.By combining care with development, you can create a very harmonious and wise life.
weaknesses: There is a risk of focusing so much on the needs of others that your own desires and strengths become secondary.If you constantly give without replenishing the resource, you may become tired, emotionally drained, and feel unappreciated.It is important to remember: self-care is not selfish, but a necessary condition for your kindness to continue to be alive and fulfilled.

data: It's as if you naturally glow - people pay attention to you, even if you don't achieve it.You have a bright mind, keen curiosity and a broad outlook.You are drawn to the unusual, beautiful, non-standard.There is a lot of creative energy within, inspiration, the need to express yourself and look for depth in everything you do and observe.
abilities: You have been given the ability not only to collect knowledge, but also to understand its very essence.You know how to get to the root of phenomena and see hidden connections.However, you are not “out of touch”: your ideas have practical value, especially when it comes to helping others.You open up through communication and live contacts - it is important for you to be in dialogue, exchange thoughts, feel ownership and meaning in interaction with the world and people.
weaknesses: Strong internal sensitivity and a tendency to analyze everything can lead you to begin to delve into yourself excessively and doubt.Sometimes this leads to loss of strength, loss of zest for life and a state of being “stuck.”It is important to switch in time - to go into activity, creativity, communication, nature - everything that returns you a feeling of aliveness and presence.

data: You are a person of a bright mind and innovative thinking.It is natural for you to see opportunities where others do not even notice them.You are sensitive to nuances, quickly respond to changes and are able to find original solutions.Your creativity is combined with the energy of action: if you get excited about an idea, you can turn it into reality, and not just leave it as a dream.
abilities: You have a huge resource to achieve large-scale goals.Will, intelligence and resourcefulness allow you to move towards success in almost any field you choose.You can become a person who is known, respected and listened to.The more actively you develop your talents and implement your ideas, the more doors open, the higher your personal authority and popularity.
weaknesses: Sometimes your confidence may be external - inside there may be a fear of not being able to cope or not living up to expectations.Because of this, doubts and periodic stops before important steps are possible.It is important to remember: your power is revealed in action, in movement, in creating new things - and not in trying to be “perfect” before starting the journey.

data: You are a person of bright personality, broad-minded and highly intelligent.Your talents are multifaceted, and you are able to express yourself in a variety of areas.An inner sense of justice and wisdom guide you to use your abilities not only for personal gain, but also for the benefit of others.You strive to make the world around you a better place and support people.
abilities: You have the potential to rise very high - even to recognition at the social or professional community level.You clearly understand people, know how to build trusting relationships and are able to captivate others by your example.If you choose the path of development and act with confidence, you can become a leader, a mentor, the person people turn to for advice, support and inspiration.Bold goals are quite achievable for you.
weaknesses: Sometimes, when faced with those who think more slowly or do not understand something deeply, you may become irritable or demanding.It is important to remember that your level of vision is above average, and not everyone is required to immediately understand what is obvious to you.Patience and gentleness here will be the key to a harmonious relationship.

data: You are a person who needs new impressions, knowledge and experiences.It is difficult for you to remain in one state or framework for a long time - internal energy pulls you to search for something new.You quickly get involved in processes, want to understand the world through personal experience, “touch” life with your hands.Your emotions are deep, lively, sincere - you feel the world brightly and voluminously.
abilities: Your greatest gift is the ability to gather knowledge and experience and then pass it on to others.You know how to see the essence of things and phenomena, notice the hidden and accurately formulate your thoughts.This makes people listen to you, value your opinion, and learn from you.You can shine at work, provided that you are doing something that really interests you: then you invest fully and achieve high results.
weaknesses: The thirst for new sensations and the desire for change can sometimes push you to take impulsive steps or risky decisions.If emotions take over, you can find yourself in situations that will bring difficulties or disappointments.It is important to remember: freedom is your strength, but it requires conscious direction.

data: You are a person with an open heart.Your kindness, gentleness and sincere ability to feel for others make you someone with whom you feel calm and warm.You know how to listen and accept people as they are.You can relax with you, you don’t put pressure and don’t judge - you know how to support, pity and warm your soul.People are drawn to you because being around you makes life easier.
abilities: You are created to build warm and harmonious relationships.Family, home, loved ones - this is your element.You know how to love deeply and devotedly, creating an atmosphere of comfort, care and mutual understanding.Your presence can smooth out any conflicts: you know how to reconcile, gently guide and inspire.You have a rare gift - to bring love and mercy into the world, and through this become a support for others.
weaknesses: There is a risk of giving yourself completely to people, forgetting about your own needs.When you give too much and receive too little in return, your energy can become depleted.It is important to remember: self-care is not selfish, but a necessity in order to continue to be a source of warmth and support for others.

data: You have a natural gift for communication - you easily win people over, know how to light up the atmosphere and become the center of attention.Your energy, sense of humor and charm make you noticeable and attractive to others.Being the life of the party comes naturally to you—you seem to bring brightness and liveliness with you to wherever you go.
abilities: Your word can inspire, support and uplift others.You know how to create an atmosphere of celebration, lightness and joy.You can open up in any area where it is important to interact with people - from creativity and public professions to training and motivation.Through communication you have the ability to influence, inspire and help people become happier.
weaknesses: If you don't direct your energy consciously, you run the risk of getting lost in endless distractions and superficiality—losing depth, stability, and important reference points.Ease is your gift, but it is important not to turn it into carelessness, so as not to encounter problems and disappointments.

data: You are a person of system and order.You naturally organize space, processes and people so that everything works smoothly and harmoniously.You clearly understand your goals and confidently move towards them, without allowing circumstances or other people's opinions to lead you astray.Even in a situation of complete chaos, you retain your inner core and continue to act consistently and thoughtfully.
abilities: Your success comes from careful preparation and a thoughtful plan.When you think through your steps in advance, analyze risks and calmly build a strategy, you are able to implement projects of any complexity.You are especially suited to areas where consistency, order and long-term planning are important.If you take your time, don't give in to pressure, and do everything in a measured manner, your efforts will bring stable and significant results.
weaknesses: Sometimes it happens that the work invested does not immediately bring material returns, which can cause disappointment.It's important to remember that your accomplishments may take time, and the fruits of your work may not always be immediate.

data: You have powerful personal influence.People unwittingly listen to you, follow you, and are inspired by your energy and charisma.You are freedom-loving and independent - it is difficult for you to obey, but it is easy for you to lead others.Your emotions are lively, bright, and your speech is expressive - you know how to speak in such a way that you are heard and remembered.You have literary talent and an innate gift of persuasion.
abilities: Your path is the areas where the word becomes an instrument of influence.You can open up in journalism, literature, pedagogy, politics, creativity, speeches, blogging - wherever there is an audience and live contact with people.Your success is greatest when you use your influence deliberately and for good - inspiring, supporting, opening hearts.It is important for you to constantly expand your life experience - travel, change environments, try new things.
weaknesses: There is a risk that the power of influence will develop into manipulation or a frivolous attitude towards people.This can lead to the destruction of relationships and loss of trust.It is important to remember to be responsible for where you lead others.

data: You are an open, friendly person, you easily find a common language with different people and know how to create a harmonious atmosphere around you.In a team, you quickly occupy a respected and stable place because you know how to support, unite and work for the common good.At the same time, your main support is your family.Home, loved ones, a sense of warmth and unity are what are of paramount importance to you.
abilities: You have a subtle sense of beauty and natural artistic taste.You know how to see beauty in little things and embody it around you - in the house, in details, in everyday life.Creativity can manifest itself in design, crafts, art, landscape, style - in anything where you create comfort and aesthetics.If this gift is developed, it can become a source of joy, inspiration and even a profession.
weaknesses: In relationships that are emotionally significant to you, jealousy or sensitivity to outside interference may appear.Unsolicited advice about your family or home can be hurtful and irritating—especially when it comes from people who don't understand your values.

data: You are a calm, balanced person who knows how to keep your emotions under control.Before acting, you prefer to carefully understand the situation, see the essence, and understand hidden motives.Your mind is deep and observant.If something piques your interest, you study it thoroughly and thoroughly.
abilities: You are naturally drawn to higher meanings, art, spirituality and inner development.The world of mysticism and deep knowledge does not frighten you - on the contrary, you feel confident and at ease in it.You are able to see what others cannot and convey this understanding to people.You can become a wise mentor, philosopher, guide to the world of meaning and inner harmony.
weaknesses: Sometimes inner depth and thoughtfulness can lead to delaying decisions - thinking too long when it would be worth acting.

data: You have a strong inner core, energy and courage, which allows you to set big goals for yourself and confidently move towards them.You know how to make informed decisions and achieve your goals without unnecessary fuss.Your nature is a combination of strength and wisdom, responsibility and sincere care for loved ones.
abilities: You have the potential to achieve a high position in any field you choose.Your leadership skills, organizational skills and entrepreneurship can lead you to success, recognition and material well-being.At the same time, you are able to maintain a balance between work and personal life, creating a space where both your goals and your loved ones receive enough attention and support.
weaknesses: Sometimes you can take on too much - especially when it comes to helping others.There is a risk of starting to live with other people's tasks and emotions, forgetting about your own boundaries and needs.

data: You are a multifaceted, subtle and unusual personality.Your character combines qualities that may seem contradictory, so you sometimes appear mysterious and unpredictable to others.Your interest in the world is very wide, but you are especially drawn to everything non-standard, rare, and unusual.It's like you live half a step ahead of others - and that's what makes you unique.
abilities: Your creative mind is able to see perspective where others see only the present.You have the ability to “look into the future” - to understand where everything is leading and to foresee the development of events.Thanks to this, you can be a pioneer: create, invent, discover new directions, trends and ideas.You are able to implement projects that for others seem too bold or fantastic.
weaknesses: Sometimes there is a risk of going too far into the world of ideas and dreams - and losing touch with reality.If reflection and inspiration are not put into practice, strength and talent begin to dissipate, and a feeling of emptiness appears.

data: You are a person of action, you need constant drive and movement.You don’t know how to sit idle, you quickly get involved in any activity and prefer to create order and harmony around yourself, without expecting someone else to do it.Your energy inspires and engages those around you—you know how to organize people and set up spaces in a way that feels right to you.
abilities: Your potential is maximized through collaboration.When there are those around you who share your views and are ready to support you, you become incredibly strong: your ideas take shape and your goals are achieved many times faster.Your environment is important - a team or partner with whom there is mutual trust and a common goal.Together you can achieve very good results and implement big projects.
weaknesses: If a stronger and more confident leader appears in your environment, there is a risk of going into his shadow and taking a passive role, giving up the initiative.It is important to remember your talents and not reject your leadership qualities, even if there is someone bright nearby - you must not lose your direction and your own voice.

data: Your mind is always on the move - you strive to understand the structure of the world, explore it through knowledge, observation and personal experience.You can think clearly and logically explain complex things in simple words.People are attracted to your rationality, ability to find the essence and see cause-and-effect relationships where others are lost.
abilities: You are able to achieve success in almost any field because you are not afraid to learn new things and delve into the depth of the issue.You are the one who will “get to the truth” if it really matters.But your main point of strength is home and family.In a warm, secure atmosphere where you can care for your loved ones and make them feel secure, you feel truly fulfilled.
weaknesses: Sometimes you can get too caught up in analysis and logic, pushing your feelings into the background.If you forget about warm emotions and cordiality, inner dryness and distance from loved ones may appear.It is important not only to understand, but also to feel.

data: You are a bright, emotional person who expresses yourself openly and freely.It is important for you to be heard and noticed - you literally thrive in communication and in the presence of people.You quickly become bored with loneliness, because you recharge from interaction.Natural charm and charisma help you easily attract the attention and sympathy of others.
abilities: You have strong creative potential and talents that are revealed especially brightly in public.Suitable areas where you can talk, inspire, perform, show artistry and humor.You are able to lead people, organize processes and create large-scale projects that require not only talent, but also the ability to gather a team around a common idea.
weaknesses: Sometimes the desire to impress can surpass the essence of the matter.There is a risk of getting carried away by the external effect and forgetting about the results.It is important to remember: success is secured not only by brightness, but also by consistency, attention to finishing what you start.

data: Your intuition is so developed that it sometimes resembles inner knowledge or foresight.You have a keen sense of the situation and people, so you rarely doubt the chosen path.Even if others disagree, you know how to firmly follow your course.At the same time, you have a clear mind, practicality and a desire for order.You are responsible and take everything you do seriously.
abilities: You are capable of becoming a strong leader - both in your profession and in your family.You have the rare gift of seeing the whole situation and distinguishing the main from the secondary.You intuitively understand people, their motives and intentions, which helps you make accurate decisions.With your depth, maturity, and strategic thinking, you can lead projects, manage teams, lead, and guide people.
weaknesses: You tend to take on too much, especially when it comes to close or common matters.By caring for others, you risk forgetting about your own needs and resources - this over time can lead to exhaustion, emotional fatigue and internal burnout.
